'''Dashel''' was a member of the [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] [[Council of Lords]] in [[3951 BBY]] who was a supporter of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vaklu]]. In the aftermath of the [[Blockade of Onderon|First Battle of Onderon]], which forced the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' to land on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]], Dashel hailed Colonel [[Tobin (Human)|Tobin]] as a hero and called for him to be decorated.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
